finalGoal: Make Threadsmith usable as a practical Context OS and skill orchestrator for all-Codex workflows before considering multi-provider automation.

milestones.label: 基础
milestones.title: Skill Orchestrator foundation
milestones.summary: Mini protocols, skill discovery, route config, and self-hosting-safe skill development are in place.

milestones.label: 连续推进
milestones.title: Autopilot and usability hardening
milestones.summary: First-run polish, stop/recovery rules, continuous role loop, and verification gaps are accepted.

milestones.label: PR 合并
milestones.title: PR #21 merged into main
milestones.summary: The v0.3.0 Skill Orchestrator baseline reached main with CI green.

milestones.label: 合并后打磨
milestones.title: Post-merge user-flow polish
milestones.summary: Refresh product truth, front door, start message, docs, and skill guidance so users do not see stale PR/release wording.

milestones.label: 发布决策
milestones.title: v0.3.0 release decision / final polish
milestones.summary: Decide whether to tag and publish v0.3.0 or keep it as an internal candidate for more hardening.

milestones.label: 发布动作
milestones.title: v0.3.0 tag / GitHub Release decision
milestones.summary: Create the v0.3.0 tag and GitHub Release from the prepared release copy.

milestones.label: 补丁发布
milestones.title: v0.3.1 public documentation and hygiene patch
milestones.summary: Publish the v0.3.1 patch release for advisory risk-review documentation, public repo hygiene, and release truth alignment.
